#1
Core sector
Oil & Gas
01
Offshore & Onshore

Oil & Gas
Expertise

PROECO operates across the entire Oil & Gas value chain — from deep-water offshore platforms to onshore upstream facilities — delivering full-scope multidisciplinary engineering from concept to commissioning.

With decades of consolidated experience, our teams support major operators in the design, engineering and revamping of production infrastructure across the world's most demanding environments.

Offshore Platforms & FPSO
Onshore — Oil & Gas Upstream
Pipelines & Transport
Drilling Engineering
Offshore Platforms & FPSO
Engineering and revamping of fixed and floating offshore platforms. Full FPSO design including oil/gas systems, re-injection and subsea well systems. Topsides, modules and utilities.
Onshore — Oil & Gas Upstream
Complete upstream facilities for gas and oil extraction: wellheads, treatment and separation plants, pipeline connections, gas liquefaction and LNG terminals import/export.
Pipelines & Transport
Design and engineering of onshore and offshore pipeline systems, including stress analysis, cathodic protection, leak detection and pig launchers/receivers.
Drilling Engineering
Deep-water drilling vessels, semi-submersibles, onshore drilling rigs and all auxiliary drilling systems. Full engineering from concept to detailed design.
02
Renewables & Efficiency

Green Energy
Solutions

PROECO is committed to the energy transition, providing engineering services for renewable energy plants, combined cycle power stations and industrial energy efficiency programs.

Our multidisciplinary team combines process, mechanical, electrical and automation engineering to deliver low-carbon solutions that meet regulatory requirements and client sustainability targets.

Renewable Energy Plants
Combined Cycle Power Stations
Industrial Energy Efficiency
Sustainability & Decarbonisation
25%
Revenue share
Net 0
Commitment
Green Energy
Renewable Energy Plants
Engineering for solar, wind and biomass power generation plants. Balance of plant design, grid connection studies, electrical infrastructure and control systems.
Combined Cycle Power Stations
Full engineering for gas turbine combined cycle plants, heat recovery steam generators (HRSG), steam turbines and associated auxiliary systems.
Industrial Energy Efficiency
Energy audits, heat integration studies, waste heat recovery systems and retrofit engineering to reduce consumption and carbon footprint of existing industrial facilities.
Sustainability & Decarbonisation
CO2 capture studies, green hydrogen integration, environmental impact assessment and sustainability reporting support for industrial clients.
03
Process & Refining

Chemical Plant
Engineering

PROECO brings deep process engineering expertise to chemical and petrochemical plants, covering the full project lifecycle from feasibility studies and FEED through to detailed engineering and commissioning support.

Our engineers are experienced in managing complex chemical processes, ensuring compliance with the most stringent safety and environmental standards — including ATEX, SEVESO and REACH.

Chemical Plants
Refineries
Industrial Process Plants
Safety & HAZOP Studies
20%
Revenue share
ATEX
Certified
Chemical
Chemical Plants
Engineering for specialty chemical, agrochemical and fine chemical production facilities. Reactor design, separation columns, heat exchangers and utilities integration.
Refineries
Revamping and new unit engineering for crude oil refining: atmospheric and vacuum distillation, hydrotreating, reforming, fluid catalytic cracking and associated utilities.
Industrial Process Plants
Design of process plants for petrochemicals, polymers, fertilizers and specialty materials. Process simulation, heat and mass balance, equipment sizing and P&ID development.
Safety & HAZOP Studies
Comprehensive process hazard analysis, HAZOP facilitation, SIL assessment, QRA studies and safety case preparation for chemical and petrochemical facilities.
10%
Revenue share
HV/MV
Expertise
Electrical Power
04
Generation & Distribution

Electrical Power
Systems

PROECO provides complete electrical and instrumentation engineering services for power generation and distribution infrastructure, combining technical depth with a practical, project-driven approach.

Our electrical engineers work in parallel with process and mechanical disciplines to deliver fully integrated solutions for conventional power plants, cogeneration systems and industrial power networks.

Power Generation Plants
Combined Cycle & Cogeneration
HV/MV/LV Distribution
Instrumentation & Control
Power Generation Plants
Engineering for gas turbine, steam turbine and diesel generator-based power plants. Electrical single-line diagrams, protection relay settings, load flow and short circuit analysis.
Combined Cycle & Cogeneration
Electrical and control systems engineering for combined heat and power plants, including turbine control interfaces, synchronisation logic and grid protection systems.
HV/MV/LV Distribution
Design of high, medium and low voltage distribution networks for industrial plants. Substation layout, cable routing, earthing systems and lightning protection.
Instrumentation & Control
Instrument datasheets, hook-up drawings, cable schedules, DCS/PLC architecture and control narratives for power generation and industrial applications.
